# Krishora Technologies

> Premier AI Automation & LLM Development Studio.

## Overview
Krishora Technologies specializes in building production-grade AI systems, custom LLMs, and intelligent automation for enterprises. We bridge the gap between AI potential and production reality.

## Core Services
- **AI Chatbots**: Intelligent assistants for support, sales, and internal workflows.
- **AI Voice Agents**: Human-like voice agents for inbound and outbound calls.
- **LLM Application Development**: Custom GPT-style apps and copilots.
- **RAG Systems**: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for context-aware AI.
- **AI Agents**: Autonomous systems for task execution.
- **AI Automation**: End-to-end intelligent pipelines.

## Purpose
Our mission is to operationalize AI for businesses, ensuring scalability, security, and real-world value.

## Contact
- Website: https://krishoratech.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/Krishora-Technologies
- Location: India (Serving Worldwide)
